meta.scope: ALL matchup weeks, all seasons (regular season + playoffs)
meta.method: Every started player's fantasy points attributed to the NFL kickoff gate its real game fell in (THU/FRI/SAT/SUN_EARLY/SUN_AFT/SUN_NIGHT/MON/TUE/WED); cumulative score at each checkpoint per matchup. Step function, not a live in-game curve (no play-by-play).

sources.players_2021_2025: raw hvpkod/NFL-Data weekly (exact team per week)

meta.integrity: 2434/2434 matchup sides reconcile exactly to league.json final scores

gaps.2020: no reachable player-team source (COVID asterisk season) — all matchups complete=false
gaps.2024_wk17: hvpkod lacks 2024 wk17 — those matchups complete=false

meta.caveat_2013_2019: seasonal roster => some mid-season-traded players may map to the wrong game in weeks before/after their trade; per-side coverage still 99-100%
